title: [CI:DOCS] UPDATE manpages with MANPAGE_SYNTAX
body:
MANPAGE_SYNTAX was adjusted.

The following manpages have been adapted to the MANPAGE_SYNTAX:
- podman-container-prune
- podman-container-restore

The following manpages have had little changes:
- podman-attach
- podman-auto-update
- podman-commit
- podman-completion
- podman-container-checkpoint
- podman-container-cleanup
- podman-container-exists

comments.body:
> Just for future consideration. I'd rather not change the MANPAGE_SYNTAX and also man pages in the same PR. I'd like to get the syntax settled first.
> 
> Also, this is a huge PR to review and I could only find weekend time to do the review. Only a few man pages with changes per PR (2 or 3) would be much preferred.

Thx for the reply. I'll plan to do it the future. The first couple of times were just this messy, because I had to adapt the MANPAGE_SYNTAX while going through the first pages and include things I didn't think of before. But I believe the MANPAGE_SYNTAX is mostly complete.
Most of the older manpages had 1 or 2 typos, but I will make a single PR for this kind of stuff in the future.

Thanks @Procyhon .  And actually, the number of pages changed isn't a hard number.  For example, if you had 5 or 6 "container-exists" type of changes, that wouldn't be a problem.  Versus the container-restore changes which had all kinds of reordering within.  That one would have been good all on its own.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *Procyhon*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> /approve
> /lgtm

I did not upload the new version with the changes yet. Everything is still from an earlier version. I wanted to get an answer on the `crun` question, so I do not have to push stuff several times. 
Is it possible to open the PR again, so I can include all the suggested changes?

Recommend you open a follow up PR with the changes you’d like to see - even
if they’re not completely correct and you have questions, we can discuss
there
